episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_010:
I hear you’ve been chosen as head judge for
the next Neo Champion Stadium.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_020:
Have you decided what kind of competition
it’ll be?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_070:
Suicune always reminds me of the joy of
chasing something with all your heart!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_080:
From what I hear, to catch a Suicune in the
Johto region...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_090:
you tenaciously chased it from place
to place.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_100:
Both of you—especially you, Eusine—have
admired Suicune for years.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_110:
After following it all the way here to Pasio,
you were finally able to catch up to it.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_120:
But it seems becoming a sync pair hasn’t
changed your relationship!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_130: Our Suicune keep the chase alive!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_140:
We play this game of tag so we don’t forget
how it felt to chase them!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_160:
A relationship that doesn’t change...
That’s quite ideal.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4001_1001_170: The thrill of chasing a Pokémon forever...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/6801_1001_010:
I still have lots to learn, but I’m SUPER
motivated!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/6801_1001_020: That sort of passion is important!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/6801_1001_030: Let’s do our best as Neo Champions!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_020:
The date of the next Neo Champion
Stadium’s been announced!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_030: Are you two gonna join this time?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_050:
Silver beat me to it, so I’ve gotta give it a
go too!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_060: Yeah. We have to catch up to him!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_070:
Lance announced some interesting judging
criteria this time.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_090: I want you to show me “limitless energy.”
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_110:
Champions should aim to be role models for
other Trainers.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_120:
Choosing and sticking to such a path is no
easy task.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_130:
Yet it applies to the Neo Champions of
Pasio as well.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_140:
One must have the energy to carry on,
even if the path before them is long and
treacherous.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_150:
That is the sort of challenger I’d like to name
Neo Champion!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_160:
The energy to carry on, even if the path is
difficult...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_170: Indeed! By always maintaining high energy...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_180:
we can encourage those around us to pursue
their ideals and dreams!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_190:
I hope to see Neo Champions who can
do that!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_200: I guess we’ve gotta do our best, then!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_210:
Yeah! I’ve gotta research which Pokémon
to use.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_230:
Eusine will be teaching at Pasio Academy
soon, as a special instructor!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4002_1001_240:
He’ll be giving an in-depth lecture on the
legends of Johto!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_010:
Today, I’ve invited my friend Eusine to join
us as a special instructor—to teach us about
the legends of Johto!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_020:
He’ll be telling us all about the
Burned Tower.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_030: Would you like to take it away?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_050:
Today, I’d like to share a legend that’s been
passed down in Ecruteak City.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_070: there was a tower called the Brass Tower.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_080:
But one day, lightning struck and started a
fire that burned most of it down.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4003_1001_090:
Three nameless Pokémon were caught in
the flames.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_010:
And as for those three Pokémon that perished
in the fire...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_030:
They were given the names Raikou, Entei,
and Suicune, and they joined the ranks of
Johto’s Legendary Pokémon.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_040:
It’s said that Raikou embodies the lightning
that fell on the tower; Entei, the flames that
burned it...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_050: and Suicune, the rain that quelled the fire.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_060: And that’s the legend from Ecruteak City!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_070: Thanks for the enlightening lecture, Eusine!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4004_1001_080:
That’s all the time we have for today’s
lesson, so let’s wrap it up there.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_010: Johto has some amazing legends, huh!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_020:
One day, I’d sure love to meet those three
Pokémon he told us about!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_080:
You’re already sync pairs with the Legendary
Pokémon we just learned about?!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_090: I met Raikou back in Johto!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_100:
Shucks... If only I’d encountered Entei,
we’d have all three.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_110:
Meeting Pokémon doesn’t always go as
planned. Sometimes it comes down to fate!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_120:
Ethan, will you be joining the competition
with Raikou?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_140:
But I’m not yet sure how to use Raikou’s
speed and powerful electric moves.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_150:
If I do well, I think I could show Lance the
limitless energy he’s looking for, but...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_170:
You think you’ll become a Neo Champion
with that attitude?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_190:
I’ll make it happen—AND I’ll catch up
to you!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_200:
Hmph. Of course you will. Otherwise, you’ll
bore me.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_210:
Limitless energy, huh. How’re we gonna
show that?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_220:
My grandparents run a Pokémon Day Care,
so I’m pretty confident when it comes to
raising and handling Pokémon, but...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_230: You’ll do fine! Have some confidence!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_240:
It takes a lot of energy to raise Pokémon
with love and care!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_250:
Who’s that? I don’t think I’ve seen her
before.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_260:
That’s Juliana, from Paldea! We met at the
academy!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_280:
Is everyone still around? There’s something
I’d like to talk to you about.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_290:
I’ve been hearing reports of unusual
temperature spikes.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_300:
And after hearing from eyewitnesses,
I suspect an Entei may have appeared!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_320:
Who would’ve thought Entei would show up?
It’s fate!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_330: Could I ask you all a favor?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_350:
I think chasing Entei will help me figure out
how to show off my energy!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_380:
I’m sure Raikou’s power will come in handy
when chasing after Entei!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_390:
Plus, if we battle another Pokémon from
the same legend, I’m sure we’ll figure out
something!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_410: To find Entei, we may also want...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_420: someone with eyes in the sky!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_430: Ugh, fine. You want my help. I get it.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_440:
Anyway, you won’t be worthy opponents
until you’re Neo Champions.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_450:
I’ll find Entei quick and easy! Counting on
you, Ho-Oh!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4005_1001_460:
Koraidon, let’s help track it down from
above, too!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_070: Keep at it, Raikou! Now you can attack!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_090:
Attacking head-on might not be the best
approach.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_100:
But it looked careful to evade Suicune’s
water attack!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_120:
I guess even Entei would want to avoid
Suicune if Suicune’s attacking with a type
Entei’s weak to.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_150:
Raikou! Use your speed to distract it and
back up Suicune!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_160:
Good positioning! You’re chipping away at
its stamina!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_180:
(Big electric moves are nice and powerful,
but they can’t take advantage of our speed!)
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_190:
(We should keep attacking little by little until
our opponent shows an opening! Then we
can hit it with our big moves!)
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_200: (That’s the best strategy for me and Raikou!)
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_210: Ethan! Looks like you’re onto something!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_220:
Everyone! It seems Entei’s chosen to stay
and fight!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_230: Lyra! Your turn! Give it your all!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_260:
Everyone did so much to help me, so I gotta
pay them back! I’ll prove I’m worthy!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_270: Wh-whoa! It still has so much energy!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_310:
It doesn’t matter how powerful Entei is.
We’ll fire ourselves up so much, there’s
no way we’ll lose.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_320:
We’ll face you head-on, no matter what
it takes!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_350: Entei decided to go with you!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_370:
Combined with our teachers’ lectures,
this was all very educational!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4006_1001_410:
(I was undecided, but after watching you
all battle, I’ve made up my mind.)
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1101_010: On the day of the Neo Champion Stadium...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_020: Ethan. Lyra. I’ve been waiting for you.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_030: We DID promise we’d challenge you!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_040:
We’ve come to show you our limitless
energy!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_070:
I asked him to help me out, as a Johto
Neo Champion.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_080: But I’m not here to help Lance.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_090:
Now that you two have gotten even
stronger, I’m here to crush you.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_100: Hahaha! I knew I could count on you.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_110:
If you don’t wanna look pathetic in front of
all these Legendary Pokémon...
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_120: you better come at me with all you got!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_150: We’re fired up too! Aren’t we, Entei?
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_170: It’s a battle of speed! Raikou!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_190:
Oh? Your teamwork’s improved since I last
saw you.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_200:
All because we poured our love into our
Pokémon!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_210:
When it comes to raising Pokémon, I have
limitless energy.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_220:
I’ll show you the burning power Entei and I
have honed!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_230: We’ve gotta pull our weight, Raikou!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_240:
Our limitless energy is our passion for
Pokémon battles!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_250:
We’re gonna speed up and race all the way
to the top!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_280:
I expected as much from you two. In fact,
you’ve exceeded my expectations!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4007_1001_300: Show me just how limitless your energy is!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_030:
I could see you both working hard and
growing closer to Raikou and Entei.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_040:
So I’m as happy for you as I’d be if it
were me!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_050: Your energy is through the roof too, Kris.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_060:
If you hold on to that feeling, it’ll lead to
your next opportunity!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_070:
Let’s keep on running, Kris—as far as we
can go!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_090: If you’re still raring to go, I am too.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_100:
If we’ve Suicune here now as well, we can
start another battle.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_110: Seems you have energy to spare too, Silver!
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_130:
I never thought the day would come that I’d
see something like this.
episode_event_ch0112_ch002/4008_1001_160:
Time to let our burning, electric energy
clash!
